title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: More Guided Help, Smarter Hints
summary: Showcase how the Azure OpenAI-powered assistant guides users through challenging DSA problems with contextual hints and iterative feedback, integrated into the live CodeGrind editor.
core_message: CodeGrind now expands AI-assisted problem solving with multi-model support and enhanced guidance. Users get real-time, context-aware hints and code-completion ideas within the editor, improving learning flow without sacrificing challenge.
cta: Try the new AI-assisted problems in CodeGrind and share your experience with the community.
visual_brief: A short, 15-20 second demo video: screen recording of the CodeGrind editor showing a LeetCode-style problem, the AI assistant panel offering hints, iterative user edits, and a successful run. Include subtle cyberpunk UI accents and CodeGrind branding.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
